name: ALTRIA GROUP, INC.
summary: Altria Group, Inc. is a leading U.S. tobacco company operating through subsidiaries including PM USA (cigarettes), Middleton (machine-made large cigars), USSTC (moist smokeless tobacco), Helix (oral nicotine pouches), and NJOY (e-vapor products). Key brands include Marlboro, Black & Mild, Copenhagen, Skoal, on!, and NJOY ACE. The company operates primarily in the United States and is transitioning toward smoke-free nicotine products while maintaining its core smokeable tobacco business.
